description: Capability for the main window. core:default aggregates window/webview/event/app/path; dialog:* unlocks the save+open file pickers used by Library export; allow-app-access (defined in permissions/app.toml) whitelists every custom #[tauri::command] in src/lib.rs's generate_handler! macro — Tauri 2 silently denies unknown commands with 'not allowed by ACL'.
